text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *** Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 14th 12pm eastern 6pm CET w/ Elijah Magnier*** Danny Haiphong and Elijah Magnier do a deep dive into the US’s rapidly deteriorating blockade of Iran via the Strait of Hormuz as multiple Chinese and Iranian tankers challenge Trump’s dictates. A full update of this war and its development is on the way in this must watch show! Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/live/IM4vT-TQe2g?si=c847Cu3Xq2gRrhUh

This comes as negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are expected to begin shortly in Washington. @wfwitness

The tunnels were allegedly used by Hamas for operations and contained living quarters, equipment, mines and bomb‑making materials. @wfwitness

Nuno Felix RT @magyarpeterMP : I had an important call with @vonderleyen , president of the European Commission. We agreed that unlocking the EU funds earmarked for the Hungarian people, but frozen due to the previous government’s corruption, is the top priority. The new government will take the key political decisions on how to unlock and invest these funds, in line with the clear mandate of the Hungarian people last Sunday. The Commission will work closely with us to meet the extremely tight deadline and deliver results. tweet

Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🟥 Kremlin propagandist Vladimir Solovyov lashed out at former Donbas separatist leader Pavel Gubarev, calling him a “traitor” who failed to meet the challenges of his time and was blinded by ambition, adding that he deserves prison. 🔻 Solovyov’s reaction followed Gubarev’s interview with Yuri Dud, in which he admitted that without direct Russian military intervention in 2014, the separatist movement in eastern Ukraine would have been doomed to fail. The interview sparked wide discussion across Russian online platforms. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet

🇮🇷 🇾🇪 🇵🇸 🇱🇧 ⚡️ Do you remember that viral video of the Yemeni shopkeeper who refused to close his shop despite the heavy missiles raining down on his neighborhood in Saada by the Saudi-led coalition, backed by the US at the time? The American regime and its puppets couldn’t even close a single grocery store... let alone close the Strait of Hormuz or break the will of the people. From the streets of Gaza to the mountains of Yemen, from the battlefields of Lebanon to the resilient lands of Iran and beyond... Trump, Biden, or whoever sits in the White House... They can bomb all they want, but they can’t shut down resistance. It doesn’t break, it only grows stronger with every strike.

↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇹🇻🇦🇺🇸 "The statements, particularly about the Pope, were unacceptable. I have expressed and continue to express my solidarity with the Pope." - Italian PM, Giorgia Meloni, comments on Trump attacking the Pope. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇹 "Do Italians like the fact that your prime minister isn't giving us any help to get oil?" - we can add Meloni to the long list of people Donald Trump has beef with. In a phone call with Corriere della Sera Trump asked "Do people like her? I can't imagine. I'm shocked by her. I thought she was brave, but I was wrong." Did you talk to her about this? "No. She simply says Italy doesn't want to get involved. Even though Italy gets its oil from there, even though America is very important to Italy, she doesn't think Italy should be involved. She thinks America should do the work for him." Regarding the Pope, Giorgia Meloni said that what you said was unacceptable. "It's her who's unacceptable, because she doesn't care if Iran has a nuclear weapon and would blow up Italy in two minutes if they had the chance." But did you talk about these things? "No..." Haven't you spoken even once this month? "No, we haven't spoken in a long time." Why? "Because she doesn't want to help us with NATO, she doesn't want to help us get rid of nuclear weapons. It's very different from what I thought." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

The heroes of Hezbullah operate in cells of 3 while the cowards of the Israeli army operate in hundreds protected by thousands Yet in very occasion a ll they do is run away and then call the air force for help Yesterday in Bint Jbeil a cell of 3 Hezbullah fighters successfully clashed with a large Israeli unit from the elite paratroopers unit They successfully shot and injured 10 Israeli soldiers, including many seriously and moderately. The whole unit was placed on the ground The remaining cowards withdrew and the Israeli air force tracked the heroes and murdered them after they were chased by tank shells. (Cropped video)

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇷🇺 TASS: There is growing concern in Moscow over the potential appointment of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s military secretary, Major General Roman Gofman, as the next head of the Mossad. Russian officials fear Mossad could intensify anti-Russian operations under his leadership. Gofman is described as being of Belarusian Jewish origin. @wfwitness

"Soon guess who barges inside the room? Tweedledee and Tweedledum! Witkoff and Kushner, with messages from Netanyahu. And after that, there was a phone call from Netanyahu to Vance. After that, the whole thing started to derail." Pepe Escobar on DD Geopolitics, citing an Iranian Parliament member who was in the room at the Islamabad talks. According to the source: the early Araghchi-Vance exchanges were relatively constructive, until Witkoff and Kushner entered with instructions from Netanyahu, followed by a direct call from Netanyahu to Vance.
